---
title: "Caroline M. Gemmer"
---

## Caroline M. Gemmer

**Dates:** (b.1820/1)

**Maiden name:** (Bland)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i>

### Biography

  Friend of Christina Rossetti, she also wrote as Gerda Fay, and was author of children's verse.  She contributed to <i>MP</i> (1873), and probably also wrote the articles published as by C.M.Gemma (1862, 1864) [1851 census]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
